query:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_users_identifier ON users (identifier);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  clientId VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '未命名项目',
  data LONGTEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  lastActiveAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  isDeleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  INDEX idx_projects_userId (userId),
  UNIQUE INDEX idx_projects_clientId (userId, clientId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creditLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  delta INT NOT NULL,
  balance INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('register_bonus', 'admin_grant', 'analyze_script', 'generate_shot', 'generate_prompt') NOT NULL,
  projectId INT NULL,
  note VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_creditLogs_userId (userId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS teams (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  ownerId INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS teamMembers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  teamId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('owner', 'editor', 'viewer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'viewer',
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE INDEX idx_teamMembers_unique (teamId, userId)
);
